runners.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 305m at this track. That followed a win two back in 17.79 beating Rough Girl Mel over 305m at this track. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 305m. Last start finished 2nd in a Other on April 9 over 305m at this track behind Lap To Burn beaten 1.5 lengths (17.83). Going well and can bounce back to winning form.
